zh.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: 法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I於1174年出生在法國瓦歐可盧斯奧拉時，他的父親Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange37歲，母親Thiburge de Montpellier33歲。他於1203年3月21日與Ermengarde De Sabran結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: 法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o普利卡爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I于1174年出生在法国瓦歐可盧斯奧拉时，他的父亲Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange37岁，母亲Thiburge de Montpellier33岁。他于1203年3月21日与Ermengarde De Sabran结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hauck
meanings: German: from a dialect variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Hugo (see Hugh ). Compare Haug .

variants.name: Houx
meanings: French (northern) and Walloon: topographic name from French houx ‘holly’, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, for example in Eure-et-Loir (France) and in the province of Namur in Belgium (Wallonia).
German: rare northern variant of   Haux   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Desmond
meanings: Transferred use of an Irish surname derived from the Gaelic byname Deasmhumhnach ‘(man from) south Munster’, an ancient Irish kingdom named after Mumhu, one of its early kings.

en.lifeSummary: When Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I was born in 1174, in Orange, Vaucluse, France, his father, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, was 37 and his mother, Thiburge de Montpellier, was 33. He married Ermengarde De Sabran on 21 March 1203. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I est né en 1174, à Orange, Vaucluse, France, son père, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Thiburge de Montpellier, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde De Sabran le 21 mars 1203. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I 1174 in Orange, Vaucluse, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange 37 und seine Mutter Thiburge de Montpellier 33. Er hat am 21. März 1203 Ermengarde De Sabran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I è nato il nel 1174 nel Orange, Vaucluse, Francia, il suo padre, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Thiburge de Montpellier, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde De Sabran il 21 marzo 1203. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.Puyricard, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Al: フランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンプウイリカード

ja.Orange, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d': フランスヴァウクルゼオランッジ
ja.lifeSummary: Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux Iが1174年にフランスヴァウクルゼオランッジで生まれた時，父Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orangeは37歳，母Thiburge de Montpellierは33歳であった。1203年3月21日にErmengarde De Sabranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I(이)가 1174년 프랑스 바c루스 오랑에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Thiburge de Montpellier(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1203년 3월 21일 Ermengarde De Sabran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I nasceu em 1174, em Orange, Vaucluse, França, seu pai, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Thiburge de Montpellier, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde De Sabran em 21 de março de 1203. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I родился в 1174 г. в местности оранг, вауклус, Франция, его отцу по имени Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Thiburge de Montpellier, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde De Sabran 21 марта 1203 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Prince Of Orange Guillaume Des Baux I nació en 1174, en Orange, Vaucluse, Francia, su papá, Bertrand Ier de Baux d'Orange, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Thiburge de Montpellier, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Ermengarde De Sabran el 21 de marzo de 1203. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
